# MuleSoft Runtime Fabric

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.0) of Runtime Fabric documentation.
> See [Runtime Fabric llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/runtime-fabric/llms-full.txt) for all the Runtime Fabric documentation in one file.

## Content
